英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利
zh.Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾潔利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Treadway於1532年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾潔利時，他的父親Robert Devon Treadway32歲，母親Margaret Chapman32歲。他於1548年2月10日與Agnes Rockley在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年在他的家鄉享年26歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾潔利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Treadway于1532年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾潔利时，他的父亲Robert Devon Treadway32岁，母亲Margaret Chapman32岁。他于1548年2月10日与Agnes Rockley在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾沙安结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年在他的家乡享年26岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾潔利。

nameMeanings.name: Treadway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English treden ‘to tread, trample’ + wei(e) ‘way’, perhaps used for a vagrant or a well-traveled man.

variants.name: Tredway
meanings: English: variant of   Treadway  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Treadway was born in 1532, in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Robert Devon Treadway, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Chapman, was 32. He married Agnes Rockley on 10 February 1548, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 26, and was buried in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Treadway est né en 1532, à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Devon Treadway, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Chapman, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Rockley le 10 février 1548, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Treadway 1532 in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Devon Treadway 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Chapman 32. Er hat am 10. Februar 1548 in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Rockley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1558 im Alter von 26 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Treadway è nato il nel 1532 nel Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Devon Treadway, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Chapman, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Rockley il 10 febbraio 1548, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Treadwayが1532年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーで生まれた時，父Robert Devon Treadwayは32歳，母Margaret Chapmanは32歳であった。1548年2月10日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムでAgnes Rockleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年に故郷で26歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘジャーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Treadway(이)가 1532년 영국 벅잉함실르 헤저리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Devon Treadway(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Chapman(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1548년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 Agnes Rockley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 그의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 헤저리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Treadway nasceu em 1532, em Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Devon Treadway, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chapman, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Rockley em 10 de fevereiro de 1548, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Treadway родился в 1532 г. в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Devon Treadway было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chapman, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Rockley 10 февраля 1548 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности хеджирли, буккингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Treadway nació en 1532, en Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Devon Treadway, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Chapman, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes Rockley el 10 de febrero de 1548, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Hedgerley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
